declarations.description: A Button implementation based on FAST Foundation that integrates the Fluent design system.
declarations.name: FluentButton

members.name: appearance
members.description: The visual appearance of the button.

members.name: disabled
members.description: The disabled state of the button.

members.name: formId
members.description: The id of a form to associate the element to.

members.name: iconOnly
members.description: Indicates the button has only an icon.

members.name: autofocus
members.description: Determines if the element should receive document focus on page load.

members.name: type
members.description: The default behavior of the button.

events.name: click
events.description: Fires when the button is clicked.

slots.description: The default slot for button content.

slots.name: start
slots.description: Content which can be provided before the button content.

slots.name: end
slots.description: Content which can be provided after the button content.

cssProperties.name: --accent-fill-rest
cssProperties.description: Background color in the rest state for accent appearance.

cssProperties.name: --neutral-fill-rest
cssProperties.description: Background color in the rest state for neutral appearance.

cssParts.name: control
cssParts.description: The element representing the button control.

declarations.description: A Text Field implementation based on FAST Foundation.
declarations.name: FluentTextField

members.name: appearance
members.description: The visual appearance of the text field.

members.name: autofocus
members.description: Indicates that this element should receive focus on page load.

members.name: disabled
members.description: Sets the element's disabled state.

members.name: maxlength
members.description: The maximum number of characters a user can enter.

members.name: minlength
members.description: The minimum number of characters a user can enter.

members.name: placeholder
members.description: Sets the placeholder value of the element.

members.name: readOnly
members.description: When true, the control will be immutable by user interaction.

members.name: required
members.description: Indicates that the user must fill in a value before submitting a form.

members.name: spellcheck
members.description: Controls whether or not to enable spell checking for the input field.

members.name: type
members.description: Allows setting a type or accept attribute on the underlying input.

members.name: value
members.description: The value of the element.

events.name: change
events.description: Fires a custom 'change' event when the value has changed.

events.name: input
events.description: Fires a custom 'input' event when the value changes.

slots.name: start
slots.description: Content which can be provided before the input.

slots.name: end
slots.description: Content which can be provided after the input.

cssParts.name: root
cssParts.description: The element wrapping the control including the label and helper text.

cssParts.name: control
cssParts.description: The element representing the input control.

declarations.description: A Checkbox implementation based on FAST Foundation.
declarations.name: FluentCheckbox

members.name: checked
members.description: The checked state of the checkbox.

members.name: disabled
members.description: Sets the element's disabled state.

members.name: indeterminate
members.description: The indeterminate state of the component.

members.name: required
members.description: Indicates that the user must fill in a value before submitting a form.

members.name: value
members.description: The initial value of the form.

events.name: change
events.description: Fires a custom 'change' event when the checked state changes.

slots.description: The default slot for the label.

cssParts.name: control
cssParts.description: The element representing the visual checkbox control.

declarations.description: A Data Grid implementation based on FAST Foundation.
declarations.name: FluentDataGrid

members.name: generateHeader
members.description: When true, the component will not add a row element for column headers.

members.name: gridTemplateColumns
members.description: String that gets applied to the the css gridTemplateColumns attribute of child rows.

members.name: noTabbing
members.description: Optionally the grid can be told not to focus on selected rows by setting this flag.

members.name: rowsData
members.description: The data being displayed in the grid.

events.name: row-focused
events.description: Fires a custom 'row-focused' event when focus is on an element within the grid row.

slots.description: The default slot for fluent-data-grid-row elements.
